hero.body: Discover the ultimate blend of luxury and tradition at Marush Premier Lodge, set within the untamed landscapes of Mongolia's Töv Province.

about.body: Marush Premier Lodge Hotel & Resort is more than a destination — it's a gateway to Mongolia's soul, where adventure, culture, and luxury meet in perfect harmony.

features.title: Luxury Accommodations
features.desc: Spacious Ger rooms and suites with modern amenities and traditional Mongolian design.

features.title: Authentic Experiences
features.desc: Engage with local nomadic traditions, horse riding, and the untouched steppe.

features.title: Breathtaking Landscapes
features.desc: Panoramic views of Mongolia's iconic steppe, mountains, and open skies.

features.title: Personalized Service
features.desc: Our attentive staff ensures every stay is seamless, warm, and memorable.

services.title: Spa & Wellness
services.desc: Indulge in rejuvenating treatments and holistic therapies crafted for restoration.

services.title: Fitness Center
services.desc: Stay active in our modern gymnasium with premium equipment and personal training.

services.title: Kids Zone
services.desc: Safe, engaging entertainment for younger guests with supervised activities.

services.title: Restaurant & Coffee Bar
services.desc: Gourmet meals and specialty beverages crafted from fresh local Mongolian ingredients.

services.title: 24-Hour Reception
services.desc: Personalized concierge service around the clock for your every need.

experiences.title: Trekking & Horse Riding
experiences.desc: Explore the vast Mongolian steppe and breathtaking mountain landscapes on horseback.

experiences.title: Nomadic Lifestyle
experiences.desc: Immerse yourself in traditional Mongolian culture — cook, sleep, and live as nomads do.

experiences.title: Brain Refresh Retreats
experiences.desc: Meditate, breathe, and reconnect with yourself amidst serene, unspoiled surroundings.

experiences.title: More Experiences
experiences.desc: Every visit reveals new adventures — from eagle hunting to photography under the stars.

accommodations.sub: Each room has been thoughtfully designed to offer comfort and warmth in the heart of the Mongolian wilderness.

booking.requests_ph: Dietary needs, arrival time, special occasions…
booking.confirm_note: Our team will contact you within 24 hours to confirm your reservation.

location.body: Marush Hotel & Resort is nestled in the peaceful landscapes of Töv Province, offering a serene escape just outside Ulaanbaatar. Surrounded by open steppe and natural beauty, the resort is easily accessible year-round.

items.title: From Ulaanbaatar
items.text: Approx. 1–2 hour drive from Ulaanbaatar city. Smooth road access available year-round.

items.title: By Road
items.text: Direct access via main paved roads. Private transfers and taxis available on request.

contact.body: Our reservations team is available seven days a week to assist with bookings, custom itineraries, and private inquiries.

careers.hero_body: Marush Resort is more than a workplace — it's a community rooted in Mongolian heritage, natural beauty, and the art of genuine hospitality. Come grow with us.
careers.culture_body1: Working at Marush means waking up to the Mongolian steppe, connecting with travelers from around the world, and being part of a team that genuinely cares — about each other, our guests, and the land we call home.
careers.culture_body2: We're building something meaningful here, and we want people who share our belief that hospitality is an art form — one that starts with how we treat each other.

culture_values.title: Rooted in Heritage
culture_values.desc: We draw inspiration from Mongolia's nomadic traditions to create authentic, meaningful hospitality.

culture_values.title: Pursuit of Excellence
culture_values.desc: Every detail matters. We hold ourselves to the highest standard in everything we do.

culture_values.title: People First
culture_values.desc: Our team is our greatest asset. We invest in growth, wellbeing, and belonging.

culture_values.title: Sustainable Values
culture_values.desc: We care for our land, our guests, and our community for generations to come.

careers.apply_body: Fill in the form below and we'll be in touch within 5–7 business days.

benefits.title: Accommodation
benefits.desc: On-site housing provided for all resort-based staff.

benefits.title: Meals Included
benefits.desc: Three daily meals prepared by our in-house culinary team.

benefits.title: Health Coverage
benefits.desc: Comprehensive health insurance for you and your family.

benefits.title: Growth & Training
benefits.desc: Continuous professional development and international certifications.

benefits.title: Resort Access
benefits.desc: Complimentary access to all resort activities and experiences.

benefits.title: Team Culture
benefits.desc: Inclusive, supportive work environment with regular team events.

jobs.title: Front Desk & Reservations Manager
jobs.desc: Lead our guest services team and manage reservations with warmth and professionalism. You'll be the first and last impression of Marush.

jobs.title: Executive Head Chef
jobs.desc: Craft exceptional dining experiences using local ingredients and traditional Mongolian culinary heritage, elevated to modern luxury standards.

jobs.title: Housekeeping Supervisor
jobs.desc: Maintain our luxury standards across all Ger accommodations with meticulous attention to detail and a passion for cleanliness.

jobs.title: Tour & Experience Guide
jobs.desc: Lead guests through horse riding, trekking, eagle hunting, and nomadic cultural experiences in the heart of the Mongolian steppe.

jobs.title: Spa & Wellness Therapist
jobs.desc: Deliver premium massage and wellness treatments in our tranquil spa center, helping guests reconnect with themselves and nature.

jobs.title: Digital Marketing Coordinator
jobs.desc: Manage our social media presence, create compelling content, and coordinate marketing campaigns to share Marush with the world.

careers.form_cover_ph: Tell us why you'd love to work at Marush Resort...
careers.form_privacy: By submitting, you agree to our privacy policy. Your data will only be used for recruitment purposes.
